name: netease-music-controls
title: NetEase Music Controls
description: Control playback, volume, likes, repeat, shuffle, and lyrics in NetEase Music.
author: yitiansong4

commands.name: controls
commands.title: Controls
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Open a control panel for NetEase Music.

commands.name: play
commands.title: Play
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Play the current track in NetEase Music.

commands.name: stop
commands.title: Stop
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Stop playback by pausing NetEase Music.

commands.name: toggle-play
commands.title: Toggle Play/Pause
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Toggle play or pause in NetEase Music.

commands.name: next-track
commands.title: Next Track
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Skip to the next track in NetEase Music.

commands.name: previous-track
commands.title: Previous Track
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Go to the previous track in NetEase Music.

commands.name: like
commands.title: Like Track
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Like the current track in NetEase Music.

commands.name: dislike
commands.title: Dislike Track
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Dislike or unlike the current track in NetEase Music.

commands.name: repeat-off
commands.title: Turn Repeat off
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Set repeat mode to off in NetEase Music.

commands.name: repeat-one
commands.title: Repeat One
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Set repeat mode to one track in NetEase Music.

commands.name: repeat-all
commands.title: Repeat All
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Set repeat mode to all tracks in NetEase Music.

commands.name: toggle-lyrics
commands.title: Show/Hide Lyrics
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Show or hide lyrics in NetEase Music.

commands.name: customize-touch-bar
commands.title: Customize Touch Bar
commands.subtitle: NetEase Music
commands.description: Open NetEase Music's Customize Touch Bar command.

scripts.build: ray build -e dist -o dist && cp dist/*.js dist/*.js.map .
